2603.17419.title: Caging the Agents: A Zero Trust Security Architecture for Autonomous AI in Healthcare
2603.17419.paper_summary: Autonomous AI agents powered by large language models are being deployed in production with capabilities including shell execution, file system access, database queries, and multi-party communication. Recent red teaming research demonstrates that these agents exhibit critical vulnerabilities in realistic settings: unauthorized compliance with non-owner instructions, sensitive information disclosure, identity spoofing, cross-agent propagation of unsafe practices, and indirect prompt injection through external resources [7]. In healthcare environments processing Protected Health Information, every such vulnerability becomes a potential HIPAA violation. This paper presents a security architecture deployed for nine autonomous AI agents in production at a healthcare technology company. We develop a six-domain threat model for agentic AI in healthcare covering credential exposure, execution capability abuse, network egress exfiltration, prompt integrity failures, database access risks, and fleet configuration drift. We implement four-layer defense in depth: (1) kernel level workload isolation using gVisor on Kubernetes, (2) credential proxy sidecars preventing agent containers from accessing raw secrets, (3) network egress policies restricting each agent to allowlisted destinations, and (4) a prompt integrity framework with structured metadata envelopes and untrusted content labeling. We report results from 90 days of deployment including four HIGH severity findings discovered and remediated by an automated security audit agent, progressive fleet hardening across three VM image generations, and defense coverage mapped to all eleven attack patterns from recent literature. All configurations, audit tooling, and the prompt integrity framework are released as open source.
2603.17419.paper_summary_zh: 自主 AI 代理由大型語言模型驅動，已在生產中部署，具備包括 shell 執行、檔案系統訪問、數據庫查詢和多方通信等能力。最近的紅隊研究顯示，這些代理在現實環境中表現出關鍵的漏洞：未經授權遵從非擁有者的指示、敏感信息洩露、身份偽造、跨代理傳播不安全的做法，以及通過外部資源的間接提示注入 [7]。在處理受保護健康信息的醫療環境中，每一個此類漏洞都可能成為 HIPAA 違規。本文介紹了一個安全架構，該架構已在一家醫療科技公司中為九個自主 AI 代理部署。我們為醫療保健中的代理 AI 開發了一個涵蓋憑證暴露、執行能力濫用、網絡出口外洩、提示完整性失敗、數據庫訪問風險和艦隊配置漂移的六個領域威脅模型。我們實施了四層深度防禦：(1) 在 Kubernetes 上使用 gVisor 進行內核級工作負載隔離，(2) 憑證代理側車防止代理容器訪問原始秘密，(3) 網絡出口政策限制每個代理僅允許列入白名單的目的地，以及 (4) 一個具有結構化元數據信封和不受信內容標籤的提示完整性框架。我們報告了 90 天部署的結果，包括由自動安全審計代理發現並修復的四個高嚴重性發現、跨三個 VM 映像版本的逐步艦隊加固，以及防禦覆蓋映射到最近文獻中的所有十一個攻擊模式。所有配置、審計工具和提示完整性框架均以開源形式發布。
2603.17419.author: Saikat Maiti et.al.
